c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and reach.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Company Reports

c.d: The maximum number of contacts to whom a message can be broadcast simultaneously.
The operating systems and devices on which the app is available (e.g., iOS, Android, Web).
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Official Website

c.d: The ability to customize messages with placeholders for recipient-specific information.
The pricing structure of the app, including free tiers and subscription plans.
c.s: Official Pricing Page, App Store Listings

c.d: The level of security provided, such as end-to-end encryption and data privacy measures.
The ability to integrate with other platforms or services, such as CRM systems or email clients.
Feedback from users regarding the app's performance, reliability, and user experience.
c.s: App Store Reviews, Google Play Reviews, Third-Party Review Sites

c.d: The availability and quality of customer support services, including response times and support channels.
The ability to track and report on the delivery status of sent messages.
